div1.entryFree: Defeat, subst. ruin, destruction: made d. of her virginity, Ado IV, 1, 48. making d. on the full power of France, H5 I, 2, 107. a king upon whose property and life a damned d. was made, Hml. II, 2, 598. so may a thousand actions be all well borne without d. H5 I, 2, 213 (Qq defect). their d. does by their own insinuation grow, Hml. V, 2, 58.
